element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns 4-part modular system (body, left arm, right arm, legs) with individual health bars
Destroyed arms prevent weapon use; teaches tactical part-targeting
Destroyed legs reduce movement to single space; teaches mobility preservation
Body destruction removes wanzer from play; teaches unit preservation priority
Parts, weapons, computers, auxiliary backpacks; weight constraint system
Tonfas, rods; targets body part; close-range engagement
Machine guns, shotguns; damage all parts; close range
Missile launchers; never counterattacked but limited ammo and minimum range
Improve weapon accuracy; unlock special abilities
Support items, ammunition reloads, increased power output
Single-part bodies; much stronger than wanzers
Single-part bodies; significantly stronger than standard enemies

typical_relief_triggers: Intermission at towns/cities for customization and dialogue
Arena optional combat for monetary rewards
typical_tension_triggers: Multi-part destruction cascades affecting wanzer combat capability
Introduction of vehicle/aircraft units with superior armor
Protect-target missions with allied unit vulnerability
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Linear progression: cutscene → mission briefing → battle → intermission customization → next objective. Tension builds within missions through progressive enemy composition complexity; relieved between missions during intermission phases.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Arena feature for optional AI-controlled combat encounters

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic wanzer mechanics and melee/short-range weaponry; low-complexity enemy formations
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of long-range weapons, support fire systems, and vehicle units; increased tactical complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Mobile weapon platforms and multi-stage mission objectives; high enemy composition diversity
notable_spikes: First vehicle/aircraft unit encounter (single-part, high durability shift)
First mobile weapon platform encounter (combat role elevation)
Protect-target missions (allied unit vulnerability adds secondary objective stress)

notable_level_patterns.description: Standard objective: eliminate all opposing forces on battle grid
Secondary objective requires preserving specific ally unit(s) through mission duration
Mission grid introduces enemy units in phases: wanzers first, then vehicles/aircraft, then mobile platforms
